name: Glazed Fall Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 2 sweet potatoes, cut into 1/2 inch slices
1 white potato, cut into 1/2 inch slices
1 yellow onion, cut into 1/2 inch rings
1 acorn squash, halved, seeded, peeled & each half cut into thirds
4 tablespoons butter or margarine, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Place the sweet and white potatoes, carrots, onion, and squash in a bowl.
3. Add brown sugar, maple syrup, vanilla extract, and cinnamon.
4. Toss well to coat vegetables evenly.
5. Transfer mixture into a rectangular glass baking dish.
6. Scatter butter or margarine pieces over the top.
7. Pour water into the baking dish.
8. Cover tightly with foil.
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
10. Remove foil and stir vegetables.
11. Continue baking uncovered for about 15 minutes, or until vegetables are softened to taste and lightly browned.
